_comment: Pre-existing resend.emails.send() bypasses, grandfathered and burning down. Each of these ships UNBRANDED and writes no communication_log row, so it is invisible to the delivery-feedback loop. This list only SHRINKS — delete a file from it as you migrate it to sendEmail({ contentHtml }). A new bypass anywhere else fails CI immediately.
_migrated: DONE — org-branded, now through sendEmail({ contentHtml }): lib/actions/documents.ts, app/api/team/transfer-ownership/route.ts (plus app/api/team/invite + screening-portal-reminders, which used sendEmail already but with unwrapped rawHtml).
_remaining: ALL are PLATFORM mail: no orgId, and Pleks-voiced by design — org branding would be WRONG for them. sendEmail cannot take them as-is (it requires an orgId + a registered templateKey, and communication_log.org_id is NOT NULL). Needs a design call: a sentinel platform org, or a sendPlatformNotice() that shares the SystemEmail shell but logs separately. NOTE: the two lib/auth/*-notification-email.tsx files are already correctly branded — they render EmailLayout with PLEKS_BRANDING; they bypass only the sendEmail choke point, not the template.
